mapper.select: SELECT * FROM claude_conversations WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY last_active_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM claude_conversations WHERE conv_id = #{convId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM claude_conversations ORDER BY last_active_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO claude_conversations (device_id, conv_id, name, claude_session_id, created_at, last_active_at, work_dir) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{convId}, #{name}, #{claudeSessionId}, #{createdAt}, #{lastActiveAt}, #{workDir})
mapper.update: UPDATE claude_conversations SET last_active_at = #{lastActiveAt} WHERE conv_id = #{convId}
UPDATE claude_conversations SET name = #{name} WHERE conv_id = #{convId}
UPDATE claude_conversations SET claude_session_id = #{claudeSessionId} WHERE conv_id = #{convId}
UPDATE claude_conversations SET is_processing = #{processing} WHERE conv_id = #{convId}
UPDATE claude_conversations SET enterprise_mode = #{enterpriseMode} WHERE conv_id = #{convId}
UPDATE claude_conversations SET account_mode = #{accountMode} WHERE conv_id = #{convId}
UPDATE claude_conversations SET work_dir = #{workDir} WHERE conv_id = #{convId}
